triples.subject: US
triples.sentence: The new mechanism, probably deployed via executive order by the US president, Joe Biden, will raise compliance burdens for multinational companies operating in China.

triples.subject: IRA
triples.sentence: The first move was the passage of the US$740bn Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) in August 2022, which includes significant fiscal support for the onshore cultivation of climate-friendly industries.
